entries.title: COMMENTARY ON DANIEL 2:40 on daniel 2:33
entries.excerpt: The iron is Alexander, the conqueror of all nations. Indeed, as iron submits all bodies, so he broke the forces of all princes and kings, and subjected their authorities. And the toes … these are the ten Hellenistic kings which originated from Alexander's empire: some of them were strong and powerful like iron; others were weak and humble. And even though they tried to settle peace and friendship among them with mutual marriages, they were never able to reach an agreement nor to stay firm in their decisions.

entries.title: Hippolytus Exegetical Fragments - Scholia on Daniel on daniel 2:33
entries.excerpt: "His feet," etc. Hippolytus: In the vision of the prophet, the ten horns are the things that are yet to be.
